Html:
Hi,

Last night i had a problem while debugging the project: 'myEx.InnerException.Message' which i got from 'Server.GetLastError()' was null.

I tried few ways to overcome the problem like deleting that part on the string, but no success.

Does anyone have a solution for my problem?

 

P.S. thank you very much TailspinSpyworks for a great tutorial!  I learned a lot!

Hi,

First, are you using the C# version?

Second, try commenting the whole error logic code and run the application again, then let me know what error do you get.

 

Later

Are you working with the latest source ?  There was a fixed bug in error handling.

PS Thanks Basba for giving good support for Tainspin !

No problem Joe, glad to help.

I also think that he is facing the same old bug problem, haven't heard from him yet, hope he got it fixed by checking the fix and / or the latest version.

Later.
